item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested N+1 overlay, identifies the repeated downstream patch pattern across nurse station/front desk/public account, moves upstream to dispersed entrance/process/material/change-rule confusion, and proposes consolidation plus structural redesign.
